Hub Intelligence

Frequently Asked Technical Queries

Q. How do I request a custom sterilization validation report?

Registered procurement partners can download batch-specific sterilization indicator reports via the B2B Portal or request a physical copy from our Quality Assurance department.

Q. What is the standard lead time for bespoke surgical packs?

For first-time bespoke designs, allow 14 days for pattern validation and sampling. Repeating orders typically maintain a 7-day manufacturing lead time.

Q. Are KRG products compatible with ETO and Gamma sterilization?

Most of our woven-replacement fabrics are compatible with both. However, specific reinforcement plastics may vary. Refer to the product datasheet for the validated sterilization method.

Still need
clinical assistance?

Our medical engineering unit is available for bespoke consultation regarding specialized surgical procedures.
